meaning: adj.如毛刷的,毛茸茸的,灌木丛生的
examples: He swam under the bridge to his brushy home.
Imagine that in the morning, when those cute little things wake you up with their brushy pawns instead of the noising alarm clock.
When I approached carelessly and alarmed them, they made a sudden splash and rippling with their tails, as if one had struck the water with a brushy bough, and instantly took refuge in the depths.
It's very steep and it's brushy and there's also coyotes in the background.
There, the Golzernseilbahn cable car (13 francs return) ascends over green pasture and steep brushy trenches before arriving at the Golzernsee trailhead.
